title: Commentary on Investments: As of March 31, 2026
content:
Total investments declined to $14,421 as of March 31, 2026, reflecting a -3.1% decrease from the previous period. The portfolio remains structured as shown and continues to be heavily weighted toward held-to-maturity debt securities, which total $14,268 and represent virtually the entire investment portfolio.

Other investments totaled $153 and remain immaterial relative to the overall portfolio. Held-to-maturity debt securities declined by 3.1% from the previous period, reflecting a reduction in that category's balance while other components remained unchanged.

The investment maturity structure remains well distributed across multiple time horizons, supporting effective liquidity management and interest rate risk control. The mix of maturity buckets includes holdings spanning less than one year through ten years or more, providing flexibility to meet varying cash flow needs without over-concentrating in any single duration band.

Overall, the credit union's investment portfolio remains conservative, liquid, and aligned with policy guidelines. Management continues to emphasize capital preservation, stable yield generation, and prudent duration management while maintaining flexibility to respond to changing balance-sheet needs and market opportunities.
